data.title: 国际服合成机制介绍
data.summary: [Craft Update Notice] 10/4 (Tue) Update will add a new 'Material Fusion' feature in the Crafting Cha
data.body:
[Craft Update Notice]

10/4 (Tue) Update will add a new 'Material Fusion' feature in the Crafting Chamber with which you can select items to craft!
There are lots of recipes requiring different ingredients to craft items! 

#BlueArchive![mHwv6r9B8nGvxdOUoIMS194ykhqcV8Wp.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/mHwv6r9B8nGvxdOUoIMS194ykhqcV8Wp.jpg)
